fallback.title: Aqoonsigaaga, Si Fudud.
fallback.para1: Hel lambar labaad oo fudud in la xasuusto adigoo isticmaalaya SIM-kaaga hadda jira.
fallback.para2: Ku muuji #TAG-gaaga, halkii aad ka muujin lahayd lambarkaaga asalka ah marka aad waceyso NameTAG.
fallback.description: NameTAG waxaa loogu talagalay shaqsiyaadka iyo ganacsiyada.

slides.title: NameTAG
slides.para2: Ku muuji magacaaga, halkii aad ka muujin lahayd lambarkaaga marka aad waceyso.
slides.description: NameTAG wuxuu lambarkaaga telefoonka u beddelaa magac gaar ah oo fudud in la xasuusto, kana tarjumaya qofka aad tahay. Haddii aad tahay shaqsi ama ganacsi, adeeggan wuxuu kuu oggolaanayaa inaad muujiso magaca aad dooratay halkii laga arki lahaa lambar caadi ah marka aad waceyso—taasoo ka dhigaysa xiriir kasta mid shaqsiyeed, xirfad leh, oo sahlan in la xasuusto.

slides.title: NameTAG
slides.para2: U isticmaal magac gaar ah wicitaanada macaamiishaada si uu u muujiyo brand-kaaga.
slides.description: NameTAG wuxuu kaa caawinayaa inaad xoojiso muuqaalka brand-kaaga adigoo lambarkaaga caadiga ah ku beddelaya NameTAG gaar ah. Wuxuu ku habboon yahay ganacsiyada iyo dadka saameynta leh, adeeggan wuxuu macaamiisha iyo xiriirada u sahlayaa inay si degdeg ah kuu aqoonsadaan oo kuu xasuustaan—taasoo dhisaysa kalsooni, daacadnimo brand, iyo khibrad isgaarsiin oo wanaagsan.

slides.title: NameTAG
slides.para2: Samee NameTAG soo jiidasho leh oo ku xiran lambarkaaga.
slides.description: Ka dhex muuqo wicitaan kasta adigoo isticmaalaya NameTAG—aqoonsigaaga wicitaan ee gaarka ah. Haddii uu yahay naaneys, magac brand, ama weedh, NameTAG wuxuu magaca aad dooratay ku xiraa lambarkaaga dhabta ah, si qofka aad waceyso uu marka hore u arko aqoonsigaaga. Way fududahay in la dejiyo, la maamulo, waxaana heli kara macaamiisha prepaid iyo postpaid labadaba.

hero.badge: Adeegga VAS ee Ethio Telecom · Abriil 2026

what.label: Waa Maxay NameTAG?
what.title: Lambar Virtual ah oo Matala Aqoonsigaaga Dhabta ah
what.sub: NameTAG wuxuu kuu oggolaanayaa inaad hesho lambar gaaban oo fudud in la xasuusto (2–8 xaraf) oo ku xiran SIM-kaaga Ethio ee hadda jira.
what.bulletBody: Waxaa loogu talagalay aqoonsi degdeg ah, wadaagid fudud, iyo aqoonsi shaqsi ama brand oo xooggan.
bullets: Wac #TAG-yada dadka kale iyo lambarrada mobile-ka iyadoo qiimaha wicitaanku yahay sida qorshahaaga

how.sub: Qofka A wuxuu ku wacaa calaamadda #, platform-ku wuxuu aqoonsadaa magaca, qofka B-na wuxuu arkaa NameTAG sida CLI.

tiers.sub: Ugu yaraan 2 digit · Ugu badnaan 8 digit/xaraf · Wicitaanno on-net oo keliya

items.description: Lambarrada ugu gaaban uguna qiimaha badan

items.name: Golden
items.description: Qaabab tirooyin ah oo sharaf sare leh

users.label: Yaa Isticmaala NameTAG?
users.title: Waxaa Loogu Talagalay Shaqsiyaadka iyo Brand-yada
users.sub: Haddii aad tahay macmiil shaqsi ah ama shirkad weyn, NameTAG wuxuu leeyahay astaamaha aad u baahan tahay.
users.featureHint: Waxaa loo habeeyay isticmaalka suuqa Itoobiya.

featuresSection.label: Astaamaha Platform-ka
featuresSection.title: Wax Walba Oo Aad U Baahan Tahay Si Aad U Maamusho Aqoonsigaaga

items.title: Qoondeyn Waqti-Dhab ah
items.description: Diiwaangelin iyo activation degdeg ah oo NameTAG ah, iyadoo si live ah loo hubinayo helitaanka.

items.title: Xaqiijinta Fayda KYC
items.description: Xaqiijin aqoonsi oo ammaan ah iyadoo loo marayo nidaamka National ID ee Itoobiya ee macaamiisha shaqsiga ah.

items.title: Amniga Call PIN
items.description: PIN ikhtiyaari ah oo loogu talagalay wicitaanada soo gala si kaliya dadka la oggolaaday ay kuu soo wici karaan #TAG-gaaga.

items.title: Jadwaleynta Wicitaanada
items.description: Deji saacadaha firfircoon ee #TAG-gaaga oo maamul goorta wicitaanadu ku soo gaari karaan.

items.title: Taageero Luqado Badan
items.description: Ingiriisi, Amxaaro, Oromo, Soomaali, iyo Tigrinya si qof walba u helo adeegga.

items.title: Dashboard-ka Macmiilka
items.description: Dashboard NameTAG ah oo macaamiishu ku maamuli karaan account-ka iyo #TAG-yada.

items.title: Helitaan Kanaallo Badan
items.description: Ku maamul Web Portal, Mobile App, iyo USSD *883# ee macaamiisha shaqsiga ah.

items.title: Biil-bixin Dabacsan oo Shirkadaha ah
items.description: Qorshayaal bille, saddex-biloodle, lix-biloodle, iyo sanadle ah oo lagu bixiyo telebirr.

items.title: Biil Bille ah oo Shaqsiyaadka ah
items.description: Qorshe bille ah oo loogu talagalay macmiilka shaqsiga ah, laguna bixin karo telebirr iyo Ethio Airtime.

pricing.label: Qorshayaasha Subscription-ka
pricing.title: Qorshayaal Dabacsan oo Ku Habboon Baahi Kasta
pricing.sub: Dooro muddada subscription-kaaga oo ku bixi telebirr ama Ethio Airtime.

plans.name: Bille
plans.desc: Dabacsan — cusbooneysii bil kasta. Ballanqaad dheer ma jiro.

plans.name: Saddex-biloodle
plans.desc: Qorshe 3 bilood ah — ka jaban qorshaha billaha ah.

plans.name: Lix-biloodle
plans.desc: Qorshe 6 bilood ah — qiimo fiican oo loogu talagalay isticmaalayaasha joogtada ah.

plans.name: Sanadle
plans.desc: Kaydka ugu fiican — 12 bilood oo leh qiimaha ugu wanaagsan.

paymentChannels.title: telebirr Super App
paymentChannels.desc: Si toos ah uga bixi telebirr super app (B2C)

paymentChannels.title: telebirr Partner App
paymentChannels.desc: Lacag-bixin online ah oo loo maro partner web portals (B2B)

paymentChannels.title: Ethio Airtime
paymentChannels.desc: Subscription-ka waxaa laga jari karaa balance-kaaga Ethio airtime

steps.title: Samee Account
steps.desc: Iska diiwaangeli nametag.et ama Mobile App-ka. Dooro account shaqsi ama shirkadeed.

steps.title: Dooro TAG-gaaga
steps.desc: Raadi oo dooro NameTAG-kaaga heerarka Platinum, Golden, Silver, ama Bronze.

steps.title: Bixi & Dhaqaaji
steps.desc: Ku bixi telebirr ama Ethio Airtime. #TAG-gaaga wuxuu isla markiiba ka shaqeynayaa SIM-kaaga kadib xaqiijinta.

steps.title: Bilow Wicitaanka
steps.desc: Ku wac calaamadda # ka hor lambar kasta. Qofka wicitaanka helaya wuxuu arki doonaa #TAG-gaaga sida CLI.

items.a: Haa. Marka aad ku wacdo NameTAG, dadka wicitaanka helaya waxay arki doonaan TAG-gaaga oo keliya. Lambarkaaga koowaad waxaa lagu muujin karaa SMS platform ah si hufnaan loo ilaaliyo.

items.q: Ma xannibi karaa qof iga soo wacaya NameTAG-kayga?
items.a: Haa. Waxaad isticmaali kartaa web/app tools ama amarrada SMS si aad u xannibto ama uga saarto xannibaadda isticmaalayaasha, una maamusho whitelist-kaaga.

items.q: Maxaa dhacaya haddii aan beddelo SIM-kayga ama lambarkayga mobile-ka?
items.a: NameTAG wuxuu taageeraa migration-ka lambarka kadib xaqiijin, si aqoonsigaagu kuu sii raaco.

items.q: Shirkaduhu ma maamuli karaan NameTAG-yo badan?
items.a: Account-yada shirkadaha waxay maamuli karaan TAG-yo badan, waxayna u qoondeyn karaan kooxo, laamo, ama ololeyaal.

items.q: Ma xannibi karaa qof iga soo wacaya NameTAG?
items.a: Haa. Waxaad ka maamuli kartaa dadka xanniban portal-kaaga, app-kaaga, ama amarrada SMS ee la taageero waqti kasta.
Waxaad iska diiwaangelin kartaa web portal-ka, mobile app-ka, ama USSD *883# kadib hubinta helitaanka iyo xaqiijinta aqoonsiga.

items.q: Ma u isticmaali karaa NameTAG-kayga branding ganacsi?
items.a: Haa. Isticmaalayaasha ganacsiga waxay abuuri karaan tags brand leh, waxayna dejin karaan welcome prompt, routing, iyo identity settings.

items.q: Waa maxay doorashooyinka lacag-bixinta ee la heli karo?
items.a: Waxaad ku bixin kartaa telebirr Super App, partner channels, ama Ethio airtime iyadoo ku xiran qorshaha subscription-kaaga.

items.q: Ma ku wareejin karaa NameTAG-kayga lambar kale?
items.a: Wareejinta iyo migration-ka waa la taageeraa kadib xaqiijin iyo hubinta shuruudaha uu qeexayo policy-ga platform-ka.

items.q: NameTAG ma lagu heli karaa luqado badan?
items.a: Haa. Adeeggu wuxuu taageeraa luqado badan oo ay ku jiraan English, Amharic, Afaan Oromo, Somali, iyo Tigrinya.

cta.title: Ka Badanow Lambar Kaliya.
cta.sub: Ka diiwaangeli NameTAG-kaaga www.nametag.et ama garaac *883# maanta.

footer.tagline: Platform-kii ugu horreeyay ee aqoonsiga wicitaanka ee Itoobiya, kaasoo beddelaya sida dadka kuu arkaan marka aad waceyso—lambar dheer halkii laga arki lahaa, #TAG gaaban oo si dhab ah kuu matala ayaa la arkaa.
